task_name: Implement Mock Builder Adapter Endpoint Handler
goal: Implement a local mock Builder Adapter endpoint handler that reuses existing fixtures and does not call live Builder or network systems.
claims: The mock endpoint handler accepts local JSON input and returns the same mock response envelope as the adapter.
The endpoint fixture test reuses existing BP-007, BP-008, and BP-009 fixture expectations.
The implementation does not add live Builder, network, package, docs, or app runtime behavior.
assumptions: A local CLI endpoint handler is sufficient for the first mock-backed endpoint implementation.
Reusing the existing adapter CLI as the local execution backend avoids duplicating adapter logic.
HTTP server, auth, persistence, and live Builder calls remain out of scope.
dod: node tools/test-builder-adapter-endpoint-fixtures.cjs exits 0 and covers allow, reject, pending human review, scope violation, blocked operation, and approved human review.
stop_conditions: Live Builder endpoint or network behavior becomes necessary
Package, docs, existing adapter, or app runtime edits become necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-010 defined the mock endpoint boundary: implement only mock-backed behavior, reuse existing fixtures, keep mock=true and decision_ready=false, and avoid live Builder/network behavior.
